composition_pattern: fill-cover -> replace-body-lines -> insert-support-pages -> delete-superseded-pages -> reorder-kept-pages -> rebuild-nested-outline
user_task_description: Replace only the superseded Sheet B pages.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Replace only the superseded Sheet B pages, keep previously approved pages untouched, update the resubmittal cover note and page-count callout, and preserve the bookmark order in the returned package.
atomic_scope: Only the cover lines, body lines, inserted support pages, deleted stale pages, final page order, and outline are required.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf artifact that completes the requested cross-document document operation.

notes.Task Notes:
- Preserve the image-bearing approved pages
- Do not flatten the packet into regenerated plain pages
